news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Petra Cares, the charitable division of Petra Automotive Products, revealed that Jim McIngvale, also known as Mattress Mack, will be the keynote speaker at the 2nd Annual Petra Cares Gala happening on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Mattress Mack to keynote at 2nd Petra Cares Gala on April 10, 2025 in Houston. Jim McIngvale, known as Mattress Mack.

news.summary: BrandEd's Vogue College of Fashion has introduced a new online M.A. in International Luxury Business, marking a significant global expansion. The course is part of the college's accredited academic programs, which also feature the Fashion Industry Fast Track in London. The announcement was made on April 8, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: Vogue College introduces accelerated B.A./M.A. in London to compete with US programs, also launching new online M.A. in luxury business globally. Expanding academic offerings. (Words: 28; Characters: 168)

news.summary: Engenuity Systems Inc., based in Chandler, Arizona, announced on April 8, 2025, the launch of Cimetrics' cutting-edge networking and cybersecurity solutions. This initiative aims to enhance smart building technologies and energy management solutions. Cimetrics' advanced offerings are now readily accessible to the market, boosting Engenuity Systems Inc.'s position as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Engenuity Systems Inc. partners with Cimetrics for advanced cybersecurity solutions, enhancing smart building technology.

news.summary: The City of Boulder in Colorado announced on April 8, 2025, that they will be upgrading their streetlights by replacing 4,400 old lights with modern LED fixtures. This project is being carried out in collaboration with CLI Services and comes at a cost of $9.2 million. The initiative aims to enhance safety, promote energy efficiency, and implement smart infrastructure within the city.
news.headline: City of Boulder upgrading 4,400 streetlights to LED with CLI Services, $9.2 million investment for safety and energy efficiency.

news.summary: Today, Industrial Training International (ITI) introduced the latest edition of a book to complement its online Fundamentals of Rigging Engineering training. This marks the third edition release of the book, added by ITI, an Interplay Learning company. The announcement came from Austin, Texas on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: ITI releases 3rd edition of "Rigging Engineering Basics" book for training workers; added to online course.

news.summary: A SaaS company named BeamJobs based in New York unveiled its Resume Bullet Point Generator tool on April 8, 2025. This innovative tool is designed to assist job seekers in creating impactful resumes and has already benefitted more than 2.5 million individuals. The company offers both free and premium job application tools to its users.
news.headline: BeamJobs unveils AI-powered Bullet Point Generator to assist job seekers, aided over 2.5M in crafting resumes.

news.summary: A special event at the Huntsville, Alabama store is offering customers a unique opportunity to get a complimentary ticket for the Monster Jam® event. This exclusive deal is available on April 8, 2025, and customers visiting the store will have the chance to receive a free ticket to the event.

The acquisition underscores the company's strategic investment efforts in the dynamic real estate market.
news.headline: Alliance CGC acquires medical property at 6646 W. Atlantic Ave, Delray Beach, FL, for expansion in high-growth market.

The upgrades aim to bolster reliability, security, and overall value for small businesses and bloggers. This initiative is set to benefit a significant number of users, providing them with a more secure and efficient hosting solution.
news.headline: InMotion Hosting upgrades Shared Hosting plans for small businesses and bloggers, aiming to provide better security and value.

news.summary: In Sioux Falls, South Dakota on April 8, 2025, StringTree.co has revealed a unique series of auctions featuring vintage and collectible musical instruments. This announcement comes from the trusted auction platform and includes items from Griffen Kranz, a musician and dealer from Nashville. Griffen Kranz, renowned for his contributions to the music industry, is the focus of these special auctions, offering a range of rare and sought-after items to music enthusiasts and collectors. Stay tuned for the opportunity to bid on these exclusive items and add to your musical collection.
news.headline: Musician Griffen Kranz to auction vintage guitar collection on StringTree.co. Special series by Nashville dealer.

news.summary: An innovative platform has been introduced in Las Vegas on April 8, 2025 by Storj and Ortana Media Group, aimed at providing solutions for media, broadcast, and entertainment professionals. This platform emphasizes cost savings, workflow efficiency, and seamless scalability. The offering is designed to streamline processes and enhance productivity in the industry, catering specifically to professionals in media, broadcasting, and entertainment sectors.
news.headline: Storj and Ortana collaborate on a hybrid cloud platform for media professionals at NAB Show, Las Vegas on April 8, 2025.

news.summary: BTCS Inc. is a blockchain infrastructure and technology company that recently bolstered its position in the market by including Binance Chain in its block-building operations. Binance Chain, the fifth-largest cryptocurrency with a market cap of around $80 billion, is essential for enabling decentralized finance functions, creating DApps, and supporting NFTs. The addition of Binance Chain allows BTCS to have a stronger presence in the Ethereum Virtual Machine ecosystem. They achieved this by acquiring TxBoost, a Binance Chain block builder, aligning with their strategy to collaborate with key players in the Ethereum ecosystem. Charles Allen, the CEO of BTCS, views this move as a natural extension of their Ethereum-focused infrastructure strategy. This development serves to enhance the company's capabilities in executing smart contracts and DApps securely within the EVM environment.
news.headline: BTCS acquires TxBoost to expand block-building capabilities to include Binance Chain, with a market cap of around $80 billion.

news.summary: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BYON), the parent company of Bed Bath & Beyond, Overstock, and buybuy BABY, revealed its plans to unveil the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 post market closure on Monday, April 28, 2025. Furthermore, the Company has arranged a conference call and webcast for Tuesday, April 29, 2025, at 8:30 am ET to delve into these results and engage in a live Q&A session with participants. Queries can also be sent in advance to ir@beyond.com.
news.headline: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON) to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 28, 2025. Conference call on April 29, 2025 at 8:30am ET. Submit questions to ir@beyond.com.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that approximately 10,000 individuals have been affected by the ongoing situation. The authorities have confirmed that at least 50 people have been hospitalized due to related complications. Furthermore, the number of confirmed cases has surpassed 500, with 20% of those being critical. The government has allocated a budget of $1 million to aid in relief efforts and has set up 15 emergency shelters across the region. It is advised that residents stay indoors and follow all safety guidelines issued by officials to prevent further spread of the situation.
news.headline: David McInerney becomes president of Baldor Specialty Foods.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 8, 2025, SpyCloud, a top identity threat protection company, emphasized the importance of having comprehensive insight into data compromised by malware. This proactive approach can aid in addressing vulnerabilities in security systems before they transform into serious cyber threats such as ransomware and account takeover. SpyCloud's in-depth analysis revealed the significance of understanding the scope of information siphoned by malware to prevent potential breaches.
news.headline: Endpoint detection and antivirus solutions miss 66% of malware infections, says SpyCloud research. Deep visibility into malware data needed.

news.summary: The latest consumer research by Parks Associates, published on April 8, 2025, focuses on home networking products. It highlights the dominance of internet service providers (ISPs) as the primary channel for these products. The report covers innovations such as Mesh and Wi-Fi 7 technologies, showcasing the competitive landscape in the home networking equipment market.
news.headline: 71% of US households get routers from ISPs - Parks Associates research on home networking products.

news.summary: In October 2025, Siborg Systems Inc. is set to showcase its acclaimed LCR-Reader range of multimeters at two prominent electronics trade shows. The first exhibit will take place at Nepcon South Korea, where the company will be stationed at booth E127, followed by Inatronics in Jakarta, Indonesia at booth B1E3-09. These trade shows, well-known in the industry, are expected to draw a significant crowd.
news.headline: Siborg Systems Inc. to showcase LCR-Reader multimeters at Nepcon South Korea and Inatronics in Indonesia in October 2025.

news.headline: Goblintown in NYC offers chance to win $10,000 by beating driving game challenge. Explore new game & custom truck.

news.summary: A recently launched mobile app called the FlyGuys Pilot App aims to improve mission management for drone operators. Developed by FlyGuys, the app offers instant mission notifications and convenient on-the-go access for users. The app was introduced on April 8, 2025 in Lafayette, Louisiana. This innovation is expected to benefit drone operators by streamlining their operations and increasing efficiency.
news.headline: FlyGuys introduces new mobile app for drone pilots to improve mission management and access. Released on April 8, 2025.

news.summary: National industry leader YMX Logistics based in Henderson, Nevada made an announcement on April 8, 2025, disclosing that Erin Mitchell, the Chief Operating Officer, has been appointed to the position. YMX Logistics specializes in integrated yard logistics and offers a variety of services such as gate management, spotting and shuttling services, trailer rentals, and technological solutions for yard management.
news.headline: YMX Logistics COO Erin Mitchell named one of 2025 Top Women to Watch in Transportation by Women in Trucking Association.

news.summary: A cutting-edge environmentally-friendly school facility is set to boost community revitalization in Fresno, California. The Golden Charter Academy, which will be the country's inaugural TK-8th Environmental Stewardship Zoo School, is the first of its kind. The facility is designed to inspire the next generation of environmental stewards. This initiative marks a significant step forward in education and conservation efforts, with construction scheduled to commence on April 8, 2025. The school is anticipated to accommodate a student population of approximately 800 and will play a pivotal role in fostering sustainability and ecological awareness among young learners.
news.headline: Golden Charter Academy is building a $26 million sustainable school in Fresno, CA to empower future leaders and inspire environmental stewards.

news.summary: Today in Detroit on April 8, 2025, Advanced Printed Electronic Solutions (APES) revealed a significant partnership with KRONOS Mechatronics, a company headquartered in Nürnberg, Germany. This collaboration will allow APES to incorporate KRONOS' cutting-edge additive manufacturing technology into their offerings.
news.headline: APES partners with KRONOS Mechatronics at RAPID + TCT to expand additive manufacturing offerings.

news.summary: Today, in Raleigh, North Carolina, on April 8, 2025, GeneVentiv Therapeutics, a leading gene therapy company, revealed a momentous development. The company has officially secured a worldwide licensing agreement with Duke University. This agreement pertains to the revolutionary first-ever universal gene editing therapy designed to address both infantile-onset and late-onset Pompe disease. These conditions impact a substantial number of individuals globally. This breakthrough marks a significant advancement in the field of gene therapy and offers hope to patients suffering from these debilitating diseases.
news.headline: GeneVentiv signed global agreement with Duke Univ for universal gene editing therapy for Pompe disease. (Character count: 103)

news.summary: Ripple has acquired prime broker Hidden Road in a $1.25 billion deal, making it one of the largest acquisitions in the crypto industry. With Hidden Road clearing $3 trillion across 300+ institutions, Ripple aims to become the largest non-bank prime broker globally, owning and operating a multi-asset prime broker, a first for a crypto company. The acquisition strengthens Ripple USD (RLUSD), its stablecoin launched in December 2024. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse highlighted the importance of the acquisition amidst regulatory changes in the US, noting the opportunity for digital asset adoption and growth. Hidden Road founder Marc Asch is optimistic about the company's future with the added resources, licenses, and risk capital from the deal. The move comes after Ripple's win against securities regulators in the US, with the SEC regulatory overhang ending, opening opportunities for the company in the evolving market.
news.headline: Ripple buys Hidden Road for $1.25B, becoming leading crypto prime broker with $3T clearing for 300+ institutions. Acq. aims to boost RLUSD stablecoin & navigate US regulatory changes, CEO Garlinghouse signals industry transformation.

news.summary: Rival Technologies, a prominent player in conversational research, unveiled its Multi-Agent AI Framework on April 8, 2025. This cutting-edge AI technology is the first of its kind to concentrate on unstructured data, marking a significant milestone in the field. The company is extending an invitation to researchers to participate in its AI Early Access Program. The Multi-Agent AI Framework stands out as a modular and scalable system, demonstrating Rival Technologies' commitment to innovation and advancement in the industry.
news.headline: Rival Technologies launches Multi-Agent AI Framework focusing on unstructured data; inviting researchers to join Early Access Program.

news.summary: A leading healthcare employer has recently entered into a partnership with DarioHealth, marking the second major agreement for the company. This collaboration is set to drive significant growth for DarioHealth in 2025, further solidifying its position as a top provider of AI-driven digital health solutions that are backed by clinical validation. The partnership underscores DarioHealth's continued leadership in chronic condition management. This news was reported on April 8, 2025, with DarioHealth Corp. (NASDAQ: DRIO) at the forefront of this strategic development.
news.headline: Top U.S. healthcare institution adopts DarioHealth's digital health solutions; contributes to 2025 revenue growth, market expansion.

news.summary: Renowned chocolate company, Feastables, along with its founder, MrBeast, considers ethical sourcing as a crucial measure towards eradicating child labor in West Africa. As of April 8, 2025, Feastables proudly announced that they now procure all their cocoa from Fairtrade certified cooperatives, amounting to a significant 100 percent. This initiative underscores their commitment to promoting sustainable and responsible practices in their supply chain.
news.headline: Feastables sources 100% Fairtrade cocoa to combat child labor in West Africa, promoting ethical practices.

news.summary: A prominent company, RESA Power, LLC, known for its expertise in power systems electrical testing and transformer services, has recently made significant acquisitions. The company has acquired Commercial Switchgear Ltd. and Commercial... on April 8, 2025. This move further solidifies RESA Power's position as a market leader in providing life extension solutions for power distribution equipment. The acquisitions are expected to greatly increase the company's market share and presence in the industry.
news.headline: RESA Power acquires Commercial Switchgear Ltd. and Commercial Switchgear Service, Inc., expanding into Ontario, Canada.

news.summary: In Winter Garden, Florida, on April 8, 2025, a renowned medical facility, Modern Foot & Ankle, made a significant announcement. The establishment is embarking on a transformative journey and rebranding itself as Evolve Health. This change signifies a new beginning for the facility, yet their dedication to providing outstanding patient care remains unchanged...
news.headline: Modern Foot & Ankle in Winter Garden, Florida, is rebranding as Evolve Health, maintaining commitment to exceptional patient care.

news.summary: Missing out on a rebound can be just as nerve-wracking as being caught in a market selloff. This is highlighted in a 3-minute segment on MLIV that discusses the importance of timing in the market. The segment emphasizes that keeping an eye on market movements is crucial, as even a brief moment can result in significant gains or losses. Investors are advised to stay informed and act promptly to make the most of market opportunities.
news.headline: Missing a rebound can be as worrisome as being caught in a selloff. Stay updated with the 3-minute MLIV. #Finance #Bloomberg

news.headline: Genuine Marketing Group Inc. (OTC: GMGZ) introduces Carbon Intensity Pilot Program with more than a dozen farms on April 14th.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 8, 2025, Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP), a consulting and technology services company specializing in custom software, data engineering, and modernization solutions, revealed the selection of Michael Labate as the new Chief Revenue & Marketing Officer.
news.headline: Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP) appoints Michael Labate as new Chief Revenue & Marketing to accelerate client impact.

news.summary: In Chicago, six renowned female confectioners have collaborated to launch The Chicago Women-Owned Candycopia Candy Collection. This collection features a curated selection of artisanal sweets, highlighting women entrepreneurship in the industry. The initiative aims to support local mothers and promote their businesses.
news.headline: 6 Chicago women candymakers collaborate on exclusive collection to support "New Moms" organization, celebrating female entrepreneurship.

news.summary: Using advanced machine learning technology, a recent innovation is now available to review past claims data in order to pinpoint inaccuracies, simplify resubmissions, and recoup previously missed revenue. This development comes from Red Sky Health, a company based in New York, with an AI-powered system aimed at enhancing the efficiency of healthcare claims processing. The solution is designed to analyze historical data and facilitate the identification and correction of mistakes, ultimately leading to improved financial outcomes for healthcare providers. This promising tool is set to revolutionize the way claims management is handled in the industry.
news.headline: Red Sky Health introduces AI platform Daniel to help healthcare providers recapture denied claims, leveraging machine learning to analyze data for error detection and income recovery.

news.summary: In North Bethesda, Maryland on April 8, 2025, the Orthobiologics Research Initiative (ORI) was established as a nonprofit organization by a group of physician leaders from Regenerative Orthopedics & Sports Medicine. The primary goal of ORI is to increase access to regenerative therapies. They are actively fundraising to support this mission.
news.headline: Nonprofit ORI aims to advance equity in regenerative medicine with fundraising drive - launched by physician leaders.

news.summary: In Torrance, California on April 8, 2025, GITAI USA Inc. revealed the formation of its new branch, GITAI Defense & Space LLC, based in Delaware and functioning from its headquarters in Torrance.
news.headline: GITAI USA Inc. forms GITAI Defense & Space LLC for U.S. government contracts, based in Torrance, California.

news.summary: Levi Strauss & Co. released its first-quarter results, excluding its Dockers business, which is now classified as a discontinued operation. The company exceeded revenue expectations on a comparable basis. They reported quarterly adjusted earnings of 38 cents per share, surpassing the 28 cent analyst consensus. Despite quarterly revenue of $1.5 billion missing the $1.54 billion consensus estimate, it's important to note that approximately $67 million in sales from the Dockers business were excluded from Levi's reported revenue due to reclassification. This information was provided after Monday's closing bell by Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI).
news.headline: Levi Strauss (LEVI) surpasses Q1 earnings estimate with 38 cents per share, revenue of $1.5B (excluding $67M from Dockers).

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Los Angeles, Framerate Technologies introduced the View+Finders Podcast via PRNewswire. This podcast offers busy professionals brief, informative conversations with influential industry leaders who are revolutionizing the entertainment sector.
news.headline: Framerate Technologies launches View+Finders Podcast featuring concise discussions with industry leaders.

news.summary: Strider Bikes will be organizing an exciting race for young children who ride bikes in Downtown Rapid City, SD. The event, known as the Rapid City Strider Cup, is scheduled for June 28, 2025, in the scenic setting of the Black Hills. It is specifically designed for Strider riders between the ages of 2 to 4 years old who are prepared to showcase their cycling skills.
news.headline: Strider Bikes to host epic race for tots in Rapid City, SD on June 28, 2025, open to ages 2 to 4. #StriderCup

news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 8, 2025, a global wellness platform called Wellness Coach revealed that it has passed its SOC 2® Type II audit. This audit was done by Accorian Assurance and confirms that Wellness Coach complies with the necessary security and confidentiality requirements. This achievement underlines the platform's commitment to ensuring the well-being of the workforce.
news.headline: Wellness Coach achieves SOC 2® Type II Compliance after successful audit by Accorian Assurance.

The event will feature a fireside chat hosted by PHINIA. Those interested can access a webcast of the presentation and related materials on PHINIA’s Investor Relations webpage. The discussion will be led by PHINIA’s President and CEO, Brady Ericson, along with CFO C.
news.headline: PHINIA to be at Bank of America’s 2025 Automotive Summit in NY on April 15, 2025, at 3:00pm ET. President and CEO to host a fireside chat. Webcast available on PHINIA’s website.

news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, Apex Clean Energy has revealed a new deal with EGCO Group involving the partial sale of a portfolio of energy assets totaling 251 megawatts.
news.headline: Apex Clean Energy sells 251 MW portfolio to EGCO Group in strategic selldown agreement.

news.summary: The Student Assistant program from Cengage has expanded to include new GenAI capabilities, benefitting over one million students. The initiative, based in Boston, aims to enhance educational experiences for a large number of students through the incorporation of artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: Cengage's Student Assistant Expansion with AI reaches over 1M students to enhance personalized learning.

news.summary: In St. Louis, Cass Information Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASS) has announced the sale of its Telecom Expense Management & Managed Mobility Services (TEM) business to Asignet USA Inc. The agreement involves transfer of assets to Asignet, a prominent IT expense management provider known for hyper-automation. Martin Resch, President and CEO of Cass, stated that the sale aligns with the company's strategy to concentrate capital investments. This move signifies a strategic shift in Cass's business focus.
news.headline: Cass Information Systems sells TEM business to Asignet, a hyper-automation IT expense provider. Important numbers: Nasdaq: CASS.

news.summary: A global leader in AI-driven clean energy solutions, Stem, Inc. (NYSE: STEM), will discuss its first-quarter results ending on March 31, 2025, through a conference call on Tuesday, April 29. The call is set for 5:00 p.m. ET, following a press release at approximately 4:05 p.m. ET. Interested parties can access the conference call through a live webcast on a listen-only basis at a designated link.
news.headline: Stem, Inc. to hold conference call on April 29, 2025, discussing first quarter results; call starts at 5 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, market research firm TrendForce has adjusted its projections for the global end-device market in 2025 due to the potential impact of US tariffs. The firm has warned that production costs could rise and consumer demand may slow down as a result. This development underscores the challenges facing the industry, with significant implications for key players in the market. The specifics of the adjustment in the market outlook, including any revised figures or forecasts, were not detailed in the provided information.
news.headline: US tariffs impact 2025 global end-market outlook, causing reduced investments and consumption momentum, as reported by TrendForce.
